name: ACI Advanced Chemical Industries
message: Advanced Chemical Industries, more commonly marketed and known asACI is a Bangladeshi pharmaceuticals and conglomorate company founded in 1973. The firm is headquartered in the thana of Tejgaon I/A, in Dhaka. ACI is one of the leading firms in the pharmaceuticals and chemical industry of Bangladesh. Unfortunately, the company leadership haven't shown nether willingness nor interest to cooperate, so you will be able to see the great amount of their corporate data soon.
